001package net.okocraft.box.api.transaction;
002
003import org.jetbrains.annotations.Contract;
004import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
005import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
006import org.jetbrains.annotations.Unmodifiable;
007
008import java.util.List;
009import java.util.Objects;
010
011/**
012 * A class to indicate a list of transaction results.
013 */
014@SuppressWarnings("ClassCanBeRecord")
015public class TransactionResultList {
016
017    /**
018     * Creates a new {@link TransactionResultList}.
019     *
020     * @param type the {@link TransactionResultType} whose {@link TransactionResultType#isModified()} is false
021     * @return a new {@link TransactionResultList}
022     */
023    @Contract(value = "_ -> new", pure = true)
024    public static @NotNull TransactionResultList create(@NotNull TransactionResultType type) {
025        Objects.requireNonNull(type);
026
027        if (!type.isModified()) {
028            return new TransactionResultList(type, null);
029        } else {
030            throw new IllegalArgumentException(
031                    "A type whose TransactionResultType#isModified is true cannot be used for this method"
032            );
033        }
034    }
035
036    /**
037     * Creates a new {@link TransactionResultList}.
038     *
039     * @param type       the {@link TransactionResultType} whose {@link TransactionResultType#isModified()} is true
040     * @param resultList the {@link TransactionResult} list
041     * @return a new {@link TransactionResultList}
042     */
043    @Contract(value = "_, _ -> new", pure = true)
044    public static @NotNull TransactionResultList create(@NotNull TransactionResultType type,
045                                                        @NotNull List<TransactionResult> resultList) {
046        Objects.requireNonNull(type);
047        Objects.requireNonNull(resultList);
048
049        if (type.isModified()) {
050            return new TransactionResultList(type, resultList);
051        } else {
052            throw new IllegalArgumentException(
053                    "A type whose TransactionResultType#isModified is false cannot be used for this method"
054            );
055        }
056    }
057
058    private final TransactionResultType type;
059    private final List<TransactionResult> resultList;
060
061    private TransactionResultList(@NotNull TransactionResultType type, @Nullable List<TransactionResult> resultList) {
062        this.type = type;
063        this.resultList = type.isModified() ? Objects.requireNonNull(resultList) : null;
064    }
065
066    /**
067     * Gets the transaction result type.
068     *
069     * @return the {@link TransactionResultType}
070     */
071    public @NotNull TransactionResultType getType() {
072        return type;
073    }
074
075    /**
076     * Gets the {@link TransactionResult} list.
077     *
078     * @return the {@link TransactionResult} list
079     * @throws IllegalStateException the {@link TransactionResultType#isModified()} of {@link #getType()} is false
080     */
081    public @NotNull @Unmodifiable List<TransactionResult> getResultList() {
082        if (resultList != null) {
083            return resultList;
084        } else {
085            throw new IllegalStateException(
086                    "Could not get the item because TransactionResultType#isModified is false"
087            );
088        }
089    }
090}
